goal: fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g)(z) = Pair.new(f(z), g(z))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0) { fan_out[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = Pair.new[T1, T2](x0(x2), x1(x2)) }[Z, X, Y](f, g, z)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0, x1).first = x0 }[X, Y](f(z), g(z))

goal: compose[Z, Pair[X, Y], X](pair_fst[X, Y], fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g))(z) = f(z)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Z, Pair[X, Y], X](pair_fst[X, Y], fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g), z)

goal: fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g)(z) = Pair.new(f(z), g(z))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T0) { fan_out[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = Pair.new[T1, T2](x0(x2), x1(x2)) }[Z, X, Y](f, g, z)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: T1) { Pair.new[T0, T1](x0, x1).second = x1 }[X, Y](f(z), g(z))

goal: compose[Z, Pair[X, Y], Y](pair_snd[X, Y], fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g))(z) = g(z)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Z, Pair[X, Y], Y](pair_snd[X, Y], fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g), z)
function(x0: Z) { fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g, x0) = h(x0) }(z)

goal: preimage_contains[Z, Pair[X, Y]](h, box[X, Y](u, v), z) = box[X, Y](u, v).contains(h(z))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[Z, Pair[X, Y]](h, box[X, Y](u, v), z)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[Z, X](f, u, z)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[Z, Y](g, v, z)

goal: set_preimage[Z, Pair[X, Y]](h, box[X, Y](u, v)).contains(z) = l.intersection(r).contains(z)

proof: function[T0](x0: Set[T0]) { Set.new[T0](x0.contains) = x0 }[Z](set_preimage[Z, X](f, u) ∩ set_preimage[Z, Y](g, v))
function[T0](x0: Set[T0]) { Set.new[T0](x0.contains) = x0 }[Z](set_preimage[Z, Pair[X, Y]](fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g), box[X, Y](u, v)))
not is_continuous[Z, X](f) or not X.is_open(u)
is_continuous[Z, X](f) and is_continuous[Z, Y](g) and X.is_open(u)
not is_continuous[Z, X](f)
not is_continuous[Z, Y](g) or not Y.is_open(v)
Y.is_open(v)
not is_continuous[Z, Y](g)
is_continuous[Z, X](f) and is_continuous[Z, Y](g) and X.is_open(u)
not Z.is_open(set_preimage[Z, Y](g, v)) or not Z.is_open(set_preimage[Z, X](f, u))
not Z.is_open(set_preimage[Z, X](f, u))

goal: set_preimage[Z, Pair[X, Y]](fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g), box[X, Y](u, v)) = set_preimage[Z, X](f, u).intersection(set_preimage[Z, Y](g, v))
Z.is_open(set_preimage[Z, Pair[X, Y]](fan_out[Z, X, Y](f, g), box[X, Y](u, v)))
